name: HatchLine.HatchLineAttributes.Alignments
summary: Alignment options for the hatch line.

enum_values.name: Center
enum_values.summary: Specifies that the hatch line is center aligned.

enum_values.name: LeftEdge
enum_values.summary: Specifies that the hatch line is left edge aligned.

enum_values.name: RightEdge
enum_values.summary: Specifies that the hatch line is right edge aligned.
